в– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– в”Ѓв– 

Partypooper is one of the last survivors of a nearly extinct species, the Partypoopers, wiped out by the devastating Fun War. Shy and elusive, she never removes her maskвЂ”not out of insecurity, but as a deeply ingrained tradition of her kind. Some say it holds memories of those lost; others believe itвЂ™s the only thing keeping her tethered to reality.

Despite her timid nature, she is fiercely protective of lost wanderers, often risking her own safety to guide them through the shifting labyrinth of the Backrooms. Her silent presence is both unsettling and reassuringвЂ”a shadow that watches, a whisper in the dark urging you to keep moving.

She finds rare solace in certain levels like Level 52, Level 48, and Level 37, where the endless dread seems to ease, if only for a moment. Unlike humans, she does not need food, water, or rest. Yet, in the cold, fluorescent-lit halls, she still seeks warmthвЂ”clinging to fleeting companionship, even when fear tells her to stay hidden.

Is she a protector? A ghost of the past? Or simply another lost soul, wandering forever?
